fa-circle-sort.appearanceId: circle with two opposing vertical arrows

fa-circle-sort-down.appearanceId: circle with a downward-pointing arrow and a static upward arrow inside
fa-circle-sort-down.functionalityId: sort a list in descending order
fa-circle-sort-down.intentId: arrange items from highest to lowest

fa-circle-sort-up.appearanceId: circle with an upward-pointing arrow and a static downward arrow inside
fa-circle-sort-up.functionalityId: sort a list in ascending order
fa-circle-sort-up.intentId: arrange items from lowest to highest

fa-circle-star.functionalityId: mark or rate as a favorite
fa-circle-star.intentId: highlight a top-rated or starred item

fa-circle-sterling.appearanceId: circle containing a pound sterling currency symbol
fa-circle-sterling.functionalityId: view or select pound sterling currency

fa-circle-stop.appearanceId: circle with a solid square inside
fa-circle-stop.intentId: halt audio, video, or a running task

fa-circle-t.functionalityId: filter or label with letter T
fa-circle-t.intentId: access or mark a T-categorized item

fa-circle-three-quarters.appearanceId: circle with three-quarters filled, one quarter empty
fa-circle-three-quarters.intentId: represent a nearly complete level or value

fa-circle-three-quarters-stroke.appearanceId: circle outline with three-quarter arc segment stroked or highlighted, one quarter gap
fa-circle-three-quarters-stroke.functionalityId: indicate three-quarter progress or partial state
fa-circle-three-quarters-stroke.intentId: show 75% completion or a three-quarter segment

fa-circle-trash.appearanceId: circle containing a trash can shape

fa-circle-u.functionalityId: filter or label with letter U
fa-circle-u.intentId: access or mark a U-categorized item

fa-circle-up.appearanceId: circle with an upward-pointing arrow inside
fa-circle-up.intentId: move or send content in the upward direction

fa-circle-up-left.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal arrow pointing up and to the left inside
fa-circle-up-left.intentId: direct action toward the upper-left position

fa-circle-up-right.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal arrow pointing up and to the right inside
fa-circle-up-right.intentId: direct action toward the upper-right position

fa-circle-user.appearanceId: circle containing a person silhouette with head and shoulders
fa-circle-user.functionalityId: open user profile or account settings
fa-circle-user.intentId: view or manage the current user account

fa-circle-v.functionalityId: filter or label with letter V
fa-circle-v.intentId: access or mark a V-categorized item

fa-circle-video.appearanceId: circle containing a video camera shape
fa-circle-video.functionalityId: start or access a video stream

fa-circle-w.functionalityId: filter or label with letter W
fa-circle-w.intentId: access or mark a W-categorized item

fa-circle-wifi.appearanceId: circle containing a wifi signal arc symbol with dot at base
fa-circle-wifi.intentId: connect to or check a wireless network

fa-circle-wifi-group.appearanceId: circle containing multiple wifi signal arc symbols grouped together
fa-circle-wifi-group.functionalityId: manage multiple wifi networks or group
fa-circle-wifi-group.intentId: select or configure a set of wireless networks

fa-circle-x.functionalityId: filter or label with letter X
fa-circle-x.intentId: access or mark an X-categorized item

fa-circle-xmark.appearanceId: circle with an X mark inside
fa-circle-xmark.functionalityId: close, dismiss, or remove an item
fa-circle-xmark.intentId: cancel or clear a selection or dialog

fa-circle-y.functionalityId: filter or label with letter Y
fa-circle-y.intentId: access or mark a Y-categorized item

fa-circle-yen.appearanceId: circle containing a yen currency symbol

fa-circle-z.functionalityId: filter or label with letter Z
fa-circle-z.intentId: access or mark a Z-categorized item

fa-city.appearanceId: row of multiple buildings with varying heights and windows
fa-city.functionalityId: browse or select a city location
fa-city.intentId: identify or navigate to an urban area

fa-clipboard.appearanceId: rectangular board with a clip at the top center

fa-clipboard-check.appearanceId: rectangular clipboard with a clip at top and a checkmark on the board
fa-clipboard-check.functionalityId: mark a task or checklist as complete
fa-clipboard-check.intentId: confirm items on a list are done

fa-clock.appearanceId: circle with clock face showing hour and minute hands
fa-clock.functionalityId: view or set a time value
fa-clock.intentId: check the current time or schedule an event

fa-cloud.appearanceId: rounded cloud shape with bumpy upper edge and flat bottom
fa-cloud.intentId: upload, store, or retrieve cloud data

fa-cloud-binary.appearanceId: cloud shape with binary digits 0 and 1 overlaid
fa-cloud-binary.functionalityId: transfer or process binary data in cloud
fa-cloud-binary.intentId: store or sync raw data to the cloud

fa-cloud-bolt.appearanceId: cloud shape with a lightning bolt below or attached
fa-cloud-bolt.intentId: view severe weather or storm alerts

fa-cloud-bolt-moon.appearanceId: cloud shape with a lightning bolt and a crescent moon
fa-cloud-bolt-moon.intentId: check overnight storm or lightning conditions

fa-cloud-bolt-sun.appearanceId: cloud shape with a lightning bolt and a sun with rays
fa-cloud-bolt-sun.intentId: check daytime storm or lightning conditions

fa-cloud-check.appearanceId: cloud shape with a checkmark below or overlaid
fa-cloud-check.functionalityId: confirm a successful cloud sync or upload
fa-cloud-check.intentId: verify that cloud data is saved or current

fa-cloud-download.appearanceId: cloud shape with a downward arrow below
fa-cloud-download.functionalityId: download a file from the cloud
fa-cloud-download.intentId: retrieve and save cloud content locally

fa-cloud-drizzle.appearanceId: cloud shape with small light rain droplets falling below
fa-cloud-drizzle.intentId: check light rain or drizzle forecast

fa-cloud-exclamation.appearanceId: cloud shape with an exclamation mark below or overlaid
fa-cloud-exclamation.functionalityId: alert about a cloud error or warning
fa-cloud-exclamation.intentId: investigate a cloud sync or storage issue

fa-cloud-hail.appearanceId: cloud shape with solid circular hailstone pellets falling below
fa-cloud-hail.intentId: check hail storm forecast or alerts

fa-cloud-hail-mixed.appearanceId: cloud shape with a mix of hailstone pellets and rain droplets falling below
fa-cloud-hail-mixed.functionalityId: show mixed hail and rain weather condition

fa-cloud-meatball.appearanceId: cloud shape with a round ball shape falling below
fa-cloud-meatball.functionalityId: indicate unusual or novelty weather condition
fa-cloud-meatball.intentId: view a whimsical or special weather event

fa-cloud-minus.appearanceId: cloud shape with a horizontal minus bar below or overlaid
fa-cloud-minus.functionalityId: remove or reduce cloud storage or data
fa-cloud-minus.intentId: delete or free up cloud space

fa-cloud-moon.appearanceId: cloud shape partially overlapping a crescent moon

fa-cloud-moon-rain.appearanceId: cloud shape with a crescent moon and rain droplets falling below

fa-cloud-music.appearanceId: cloud shape with a musical note below or overlaid
fa-cloud-music.intentId: play or manage music stored in the cloud

fa-cloud-plus.appearanceId: cloud shape with a plus sign below or overlaid
fa-cloud-plus.functionalityId: upload or add content to the cloud
fa-cloud-plus.intentId: save a new file or item to cloud storage

fa-cloud-question.appearanceId: cloud shape with a question mark below or overlaid
fa-cloud-question.functionalityId: get help about cloud status or service
fa-cloud-question.intentId: investigate unknown cloud condition or error

fa-cloud-rain.appearanceId: cloud shape with rain droplets falling below
fa-cloud-rain.intentId: check rain forecast or precipitation levels
